mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_password (user_id, password, failed_login_count, locked_until) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{failedLoginCount}, #{lockedUntil})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_password SET failed_login_count = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND locked_until IS NOT NULL AND locked_until < NOW()

UPDATE user_password SET locked_until = CASE WHEN failed_login_count + 1 >= #{lockThreshold} THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{lockDuration} MINUTE) ELSE locked_until END, failed_login_count = failed_login_count + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_password SET failed_login_count = 0, locked_until = null WHERE user_id = #{userId}
